title: Cobblemon Optimized
description: Cobblemon Optimized combines the fun of Cobblemon with a carefully selected set of performance, stability, and quality-of-life mods, giving you a smooth, immersive, and lag-free experience.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/381832ae168218b48593f0c2e2b9de74989a01ec.png)Dive into a pokeadventure inside Minecraft with Cobblemon!
Cobblemon Optimized combines the fun of Cobblemon with a carefully selected set of performance, stability, and quality-of-life mods, giving you a smooth, immersive, and lag-free experience.

Catch, train, and battle your Poke-like creatures while exploring vast biomes, unique towns, and hidden treasures. Whether playing solo or with friends, this modpack balances fun and performance perfectly.
